steps.title: Find where the sophist reveals his exaggerated sense
steps.content: We need a quotation where a sophist directly shows (through his own words or expectations) that he overestimates his own wisdom.

steps.title: Identify the sophist's self-assessment
steps.content:
D directly shows Socrates expecting students to “seize immediately” his “clever dogmas”—his own words reveal how highly he regards his wisdom.
  • B describes what sophists teach
  • A shows dismissal
  • C shows encouragement
. That matches choice D — D is correct.
